metadata.name: Plan for a Reporter's Parental Leave

description: A reporter is going on parental leave for three months. Their editor must plan to reassign their beat and ongoing stories.

nodes.task_description: Meet with the departing reporter to get a full list of their stories and sources.

expected_outcome.value: The editor has a complete handover document.

nodes.task_description: Identify other reporters on the team who have the expertise and bandwidth to cover the beat temporarily.

expected_outcome.value: A suitable replacement reporter is identified.

nodes.task_description: Formally reassign the beat and transition the ongoing stories to the new reporter.
